proverif_model.model_code:
(* ProVerif model for Matter On/Off Cluster (0x0006) derived from FSM *)

(* ===================== 1. TYPE DECLARATIONS ===================== *)
type state.
type command.
type attribute.
type featurebit.
type startupval.
type duration.
type endpoint.
type bitmap.
type onoffctl.
type effectid.
type effectvar.
type dyingvar.

(* ===================== 2. CHANNEL DECLARATIONS ================== *)
free c_cmd: channel.                 (* Public command/timer/power events *)
free c_int_state: channel [private]. (* Internal state + attributes *)

(* ===================== 3. CONSTANT DECLARATIONS ================= *)

(* Boolean-like values (modeled as bitstrings for attributes) *)
const val_TRUE: bitstring.
const val_FALSE: bitstring.

(* States *)
const st_Off: state.
const st_On: state.

(* Commands / triggers *)
const cmd_Off: command.
const cmd_On: command.
const cmd_Toggle: command.
const cmd_OffWithEffect: command.
const cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene: command.
const cmd_OnWithTimedOff: command.
const cmd_TimerTick: command.      (* 0.1s_timer_tick *)
const cmd_PowerUp: command.        (* power_up_event *)

(* Attributes *)
const attr_OnOff: attribute.
const attr_OnTime: attribute.
const attr_OffWaitTime: attribute.
const attr_GlobalSceneControl: attribute.
const attr_StartUpOnOff: attribute.
const attr_FeatureMap: attribute.
const attr_PreviousOnOff: attribute.
const attr_OnOffControl: attribute.

(* Startup enum values *)
const su_Off: startupval.
const su_On: startupval.
const su_Toggle: startupval.

(* Feature bits *)
const feat_OFFONLY: featurebit.

(* OnOffControl bitmap bit (only AcceptOnlyWhenOn modeled) *)
const ctl_acceptOnlyWhenOn_set: onoffctl.
const ctl_acceptOnlyWhenOn_clear: onoffctl.

(* Special timer values *)
const dur_zero: duration.
const dur_disabled: duration.   (* represents 0xFFFF sentinel *)

(* Effect-related enums (declared but not used in logic here) *)
const effid_DelayedAllOff: effectid.
const effid_DyingLight: effectid.
const effvar_InstantOff: effectvar.
const effvar_SlowFade: effectvar.
const dyingvar_DimDown: dyingvar.

(* FeatureMap baseline constant used in queries instead of a function application *)
const fm0: bitmap.

(* ===================== 4. FUNCTION DEFINITIONS ================== *)

(* Equality and ordering on duration (abstract, return built-in bool for if-then-else) *)
fun eq_duration(duration, duration): bool.
fun gt_duration(duration, duration): bool.
fun ge_duration(duration, duration): bool.
fun min_duration(duration, duration): duration.
fun max_duration(duration, duration): duration.
fun dec_duration(duration): duration.

(* Equality on state and command *)
fun eq_state(state, state): bool.
fun eq_command(command, command): bool.

(* Equality on startup and onoffctl *)
fun eq_startup(startupval, startupval): bool.
fun eq_onoffctl(onoffctl, onoffctl): bool.

(* Feature-map and support predicates (abstracted) *)
fun hasFeature(bitmap, featurebit): bool.
fun supports_OnTime(bitmap): bool.
fun supports_OffWaitTime(bitmap): bool.
fun supports_GlobalSceneControl(bitmap): bool.
fun supports_StartUpOnOff(bitmap): bool.

(* We model the set of attributes as a single product constructor *)
fun stRec(state, bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, startupval, bitmap, bitstring, onoffctl): bitstring [data].
(* Fields: state, OnOff(bitstring), OnTime(duration), OffWaitTime(duration),
           GlobalSceneControl(bitstring), StartUpOnOff(startupval),
           FeatureMap(bitmap), PreviousOnOff(bitstring), OnOffControl(onoffctl) *)

(* Message wrapper for commands *)
fun cmdMsg(command, duration, duration): bitstring [data].
(* Fields: command, OnTimeField(duration), OffWaitTimeField(duration) *)

(* Helper to interpret bitstring boolean attributes as bool *)
fun bs_is_true(bitstring): bool.
fun bs_is_false(bitstring): bool.

(* Helper to compute logical negation of bitstring boolean *)
fun bs_not(bitstring): bitstring.

(* Boolean connectives on bool (for guards on support predicates etc.) *)
fun band_bool(bool, bool): bool.
fun bnot_bool(bool): bool.
fun bor_bool(bool, bool): bool.

(* ===================== 5. EQUATIONS (as REDUCTIONS) ============= *)

(* Boolean bitstring helpers *)
reduc bs_is_true(val_TRUE) = true.
reduc bs_is_true(val_FALSE) = false.
reduc bs_is_false(val_TRUE) = false.
reduc bs_is_false(val_FALSE) = true.
reduc bs_not(val_TRUE) = val_FALSE.
reduc bs_not(val_FALSE) = val_TRUE.

(* Boolean connectives semantics *)
reduc band_bool(true, true) = true.
reduc band_bool(true, false) = false.
reduc band_bool(false, true) = false.
reduc band_bool(false, false) = false.

reduc bnot_bool(true) = false.
reduc bnot_bool(false) = true.

reduc bor_bool(true, true) = true.
reduc bor_bool(true, false) = true.
reduc bor_bool(false, true) = true.
reduc bor_bool(false, false) = false.

(* ===================== 6. EVENT DECLARATIONS ==================== *)

event CommandReceived(command).
event TimerTick(state, bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, startupval, bitmap, bitstring, onoffctl).
event PowerUpEvent(state, bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, startupval, bitmap, bitstring, onoffctl).
event StateTransition(state, state).
event AttributeChanged(attribute, bitstring).
event AttributeDurationChanged(attribute, duration).
event OnWithTimedOffProcessed(bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, duration, duration, bitmap).
(* arguments: OnOff_before, OnTime_before, OffWaitTime_before, OnOff_after,
              OnTime_after, OffWaitTime_after, FeatureMap *)
event ToggleProcessed(bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, duration, duration, bitmap).
event RecallGlobalSceneProcessed(duration, duration, duration, duration).
(* OnTime_before, OffWait_before, OnTime_after, OffWait_after *)
event StartupProcessed(startupval, bitstring, bitstring).

(* Security property markers *)
event OffOnlyAttempt(command, bitmap).
event OffOnlyNoChange(bitstring, duration, duration, bitstring, duration, duration).
event TimedOffGuarded(bitstring, duration, duration, duration).
event TimedOffTurnOn(bitstring, duration, duration, duration, duration).
event TimersDecremented(duration, duration).
event TimersExpiredToOff(duration, duration).
event ToggleLightingOn(duration, duration).
event ToggleLightingOff(duration, duration).
event RecallLightingRule(duration, duration).
event StartupOutcome(startupval, bitstring, bitstring).

(* ===================== 7. QUERY DECLARATIONS ==================== *)

(* OffOnlyBlocksOnAndToggle: schematic correspondences *)
query fe: bitmap, onb: bitstring, onta: duration, offwa: duration, ona: bitstring, ontb: duration, offwb: duration;
    event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_On, fe)) && event(OffOnlyNoChange(onb, onta, offwa, ona, ontb, offwb))
    ==> event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_On, fe)).

query fe2: bitmap, onb2: bitstring, ontb2: duration, offwb2: duration, ona2: bitstring, onta2: duration, offwa2: duration;
    event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_Toggle, fe2)) && event(OffOnlyNoChange(onb2, ontb2, offwb2, ona2, onta2, offwa2))
    ==> event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_Toggle, fe2)).

(* OnWithTimedOffFaithfulTimers - key correspondence conditions *)
query onb: bitstring, ont: duration, offw: duration, offwf: duration;
    event(TimedOffGuarded(onb, ont, offw, offwf)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_OnWithTimedOff)).

query onb2: bitstring, ont2: duration, offw2: duration, ontf2: duration, offwf2: duration;
    event(TimedOffTurnOn(onb2, ont2, offw2, ontf2, offwf2)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_OnWithTimedOff)).

query ont3: duration, offw3: duration;
    event(TimersDecremented(ont3, offw3)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_OnWithTimedOff)).

query ont4: duration, offw4: duration;
    event(TimersExpiredToOff(ont4, offw4)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_OnWithTimedOff)).

(* ToggleTimersSemanticsWithLighting *)
query ont5: duration, offw5: duration;
    event(ToggleLightingOn(ont5, offw5)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_Toggle)).

query ont6: duration, offw6: duration;
    event(ToggleLightingOff(ont6, offw6)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_Toggle)).

(* RecallGlobalSceneRespectsLightingRule *)
query ont7: duration, offw7: duration;
    event(RecallLightingRule(ont7, offw7)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene)).

(* StartupBehaviorBoundedByStartUpOnOff *)
query su: startupval, prev: bitstring, new: bitstring;
    event(StartupOutcome(su, prev, new))
    ==> event(PowerUpEvent(st_Off, prev, dur_zero, dur_zero, val_FALSE, su, fm0, prev, ctl_acceptOnlyWhenOn_clear)).

(* ===================== 8. PROCESS MACRO: DEVICE FSM ============= *)

let DeviceFSM() =
    (* Read current extended state from internal channel *)
    in(c_int_state, stMsg: bitstring);
    let stRec(curState,
              curOnOff,
              curOnTime,
              curOffWaitTime,
              curGSC,
              curStartUp,
              curFeatureMap,
              curPrevOnOff,
              curOnOffCtl) = stMsg in

    (* Read next external stimulus: command, timer tick, or power-up event *)
    in(c_cmd, m: bitstring);
    let cmdMsg(rcmd, onTimeField, offWaitField) = m in
    event(CommandReceived(rcmd));

    (* 1. OFF command: always allowed, sets OnOff FALSE and OnTime 0 *)
    if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Off) then
        (
            event(StateTransition(curState, st_Off));
            event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
            event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
            out(c_int_state,
                stRec(st_Off,
                      val_FALSE,
                      dur_zero,
                      curOffWaitTime,
                      curGSC,
                      curStartUp,
                      curFeatureMap,
                      curPrevOnOff,
                      curOnOffCtl))
        )
    else
        (
        (* 2. ON command *)
        if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_On) then
            (
                (* Check OFFONLY feature first *)
                if hasFeature(curFeatureMap, feat_OFFONLY) then
                    (
                        (* OFFONLY present: command unsupported, no attribute change *)
                        event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_On, curFeatureMap));
                        event(OffOnlyNoChange(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime,
                                              curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                        out(c_int_state,
                            stRec(curState,
                                  curOnOff,
                                  curOnTime,
                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                  curGSC,
                                  curStartUp,
                                  curFeatureMap,
                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                  curOnOffCtl))
                    )
                else
                    (
                        (* OFFONLY not set: follow Lighting rules based on support of timers *)
                        if bor_bool(bnot_bool(supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap)), bnot_bool(supports_OffWaitTime(curFeatureMap))) then
                            (
                                (* Simple ON: OnOff := TRUE, timers unchanged *)
                                event(StateTransition(curState, st_On));
                                event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_TRUE));
                                out(c_int_state,
                                    stRec(st_On,
                                          val_TRUE,
                                          curOnTime,
                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                          curGSC,
                                          curStartUp,
                                          curFeatureMap,
                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                          curOnOffCtl))
                            )
                        else
                            (
                                (* supports both timers *)
                                if eq_duration(curOnTime, dur_zero) then
                                    (
                                        (* OnTime == 0: OnOff := TRUE, OffWaitTime := 0 *)
                                        event(StateTransition(curState, st_On));
                                        event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_TRUE));
                                        event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OffWaitTime, dur_zero));
                                        out(c_int_state,
                                            stRec(st_On,
                                                  val_TRUE,
                                                  curOnTime,
                                                  dur_zero,
                                                  curGSC,
                                                  curStartUp,
                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                    )
                                else
                                    (
                                        (* OnTime != 0: OnOff := TRUE, timers unchanged *)
                                        event(StateTransition(curState, st_On));
                                        event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_TRUE));
                                        out(c_int_state,
                                            stRec(st_On,
                                                  val_TRUE,
                                                  curOnTime,
                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                  curGSC,
                                                  curStartUp,
                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                    )
                            )
                    )
            )
        else
            (
            (* 3. TOGGLE command *)
            if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Toggle) then
                (
                    (* Check OFFONLY first *)
                    if hasFeature(curFeatureMap, feat_OFFONLY) then
                        (
                            (* OFFONLY: no change *)
                            event(OffOnlyAttempt(cmd_Toggle, curFeatureMap));
                            event(OffOnlyNoChange(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime,
                                                  curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                            out(c_int_state,
                                stRec(curState,
                                      curOnOff,
                                      curOnTime,
                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                      curGSC,
                                      curStartUp,
                                      curFeatureMap,
                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                      curOnOffCtl))
                        )
                    else
                        (
                            (* Toggle semantics depend on timers and current OnOff *)
                            if bor_bool(bnot_bool(supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap)), bnot_bool(supports_OffWaitTime(curFeatureMap))) then
                                (
                                    (* Simple toggle of OnOff *)
                                    if bs_is_true(curOnOff) then
                                        (
                                            (* Currently ON -> OFF *)
                                            event(StateTransition(curState, st_Off));
                                            event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(st_Off,
                                                      val_FALSE,
                                                      curOnTime,
                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                    else
                                        (
                                            (* Currently OFF -> ON *)
                                            event(StateTransition(curState, st_On));
                                            event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_TRUE));
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(st_On,
                                                      val_TRUE,
                                                      curOnTime,
                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                )
                            else
                                (
                                    (* supports(OnTime) && supports(OffWaitTime) *)
                                    if bs_is_true(curOnOff) then
                                        (
                                            (* Currently ON: Toggle to OFF, clear both timers *)
                                            event(StateTransition(curState, st_Off));
                                            event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                            event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
                                            event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OffWaitTime, dur_zero));
                                            event(ToggleLightingOff(curOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(st_Off,
                                                      val_FALSE,
                                                      dur_zero,
                                                      dur_zero,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                    else
                                        (
                                            (* Currently OFF: Toggle to ON, set OnTime := 0 *)
                                            event(StateTransition(curState, st_On));
                                            event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_TRUE));
                                            event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
                                            event(ToggleLightingOn(curOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(st_On,
                                                      val_TRUE,
                                                      dur_zero,
                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                )
                        )
                )
            else
                (
                (* 4. OffWithEffect command *)
                if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_OffWithEffect) then
                    (
                        (* Behavior depends on GlobalSceneControl and OnTime support *)
                        if supports_GlobalSceneControl(curFeatureMap) then
                            (
                                (* GlobalSceneControl attribute implemented *)
                                if bs_is_true(curGSC) then
                                    (
                                        (* GlobalSceneControl == TRUE: store global scene, then clear GSC *)
                                        event(AttributeChanged(attr_GlobalSceneControl, val_FALSE));
                                        if supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap) then
                                            (
                                                event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_Off,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          dur_zero,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                        else
                                            (
                                                (* OnTime not supported *)
                                                event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_Off,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          curOnTime,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                    )
                                else
                                    (
                                        (* GlobalSceneControl == FALSE *)
                                        if supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap) then
                                            (
                                                (* Just turn off and clear OnTime *)
                                                event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_Off,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          dur_zero,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                        else
                                            (
                                                (* OnTime not supported: just turn off *)
                                                event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_Off,
                                                          val_FALSE,
                                                          curOnTime,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                    )
                            )
                        else
                            (
                                (* GlobalSceneControl not supported *)
                                if supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap) then
                                    (
                                        event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                        event(AttributeDurationChanged(attr_OnTime, dur_zero));
                                        out(c_int_state,
                                            stRec(st_Off,
                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                  dur_zero,
                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                  curGSC,
                                                  curStartUp,
                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                    )
                                else
                                    (
                                        event(AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, val_FALSE));
                                        out(c_int_state,
                                            stRec(st_Off,
                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                  curOnTime,
                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                  curGSC,
                                                  curStartUp,
                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                    )
                            )
                    )
                else
                    (
                    (* 5. OnWithRecallGlobalScene command *)
                    if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene) then
                        (
                            if supports_GlobalSceneControl(curFeatureMap) then
                                (
                                    (* Attribute implemented *)
                                    if bs_is_false(curGSC) then
                                        (
                                            (* GlobalSceneControl == FALSE: recall global scene *)
                                            (* We abstract recall_global_scene: assume it turns device on and may set OnTime. *)
                                            let newOnTime: duration = curOnTime in
                                            let newOnOff: bitstring = val_TRUE in
                                            if band_bool(supports_OnTime(curFeatureMap), supports_OffWaitTime(curFeatureMap)) then
                                                (
                                                    (* If timers supported and OnTime == 0 after recall => OffWaitTime := 0 *)
                                                    if eq_duration(newOnTime, dur_zero) then
                                                        (
                                                            event(RecallLightingRule(newOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_On,
                                                                      newOnOff,
                                                                      newOnTime,
                                                                      dur_zero,
                                                                      val_TRUE,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                    else
                                                        (
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_On,
                                                                      newOnOff,
                                                                      newOnTime,
                                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                                      val_TRUE,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                )
                                            else
                                                (
                                                    (* Timers not both supported: just recall and set GSC TRUE *)
                                                    out(c_int_state,
                                                        stRec(st_On,
                                                              newOnOff,
                                                              newOnTime,
                                                              curOffWaitTime,
                                                              val_TRUE,
                                                              curStartUp,
                                                              curFeatureMap,
                                                              curPrevOnOff,
                                                              curOnOffCtl))
                                                )
                                        )
                                    else
                                        (
                                            (* GlobalSceneControl == TRUE: command discarded *)
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(curState,
                                                      curOnOff,
                                                      curOnTime,
                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                )
                            else
                                (
                                    (* GlobalSceneControl not supported: no effect *)
                                    out(c_int_state,
                                        stRec(curState,
                                              curOnOff,
                                              curOnTime,
                                              curOffWaitTime,
                                              curGSC,
                                              curStartUp,
                                              curFeatureMap,
                                              curPrevOnOff,
                                              curOnOffCtl))
                                )
                        )
                    else
                        (
                        (* 6. OnWithTimedOff command *)
                        if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_OnWithTimedOff) then
                            (
                                (* AcceptOnlyWhenOn check *)
                                if eq_onoffctl(curOnOffCtl, ctl_acceptOnlyWhenOn_set) then
                                    (
                                        (* Guarded by AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 1 *)
                                        if bs_is_false(curOnOff) then
                                            (
                                                (* OnOff == FALSE: discard command *)
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(curState,
                                                          curOnOff,
                                                          curOnTime,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                        else
                                            (
                                                (* OnOff == TRUE: same as AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0 on-side branch *)
                                                let newOnTime1: duration = max_duration(curOnTime, onTimeField) in
                                                let newOffWaitTime1: duration = offWaitField in
                                                event(OnWithTimedOffProcessed(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime,
                                                                              val_TRUE, newOnTime1, newOffWaitTime1, curFeatureMap));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_On,
                                                          val_TRUE,
                                                          newOnTime1,
                                                          newOffWaitTime1,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                    )
                                else
                                    (
                                        (* AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0 *)
                                        if bs_is_false(curOnOff) then
                                            (
                                                (* OnOff == FALSE *)
                                                if gt_duration(curOffWaitTime, dur_zero) then
                                                    (
                                                        (* Guarded-off case: OffWaitTime > 0 *)
                                                        let newOffWaitTime2: duration = min_duration(curOffWaitTime, offWaitField) in
                                                        event(TimedOffGuarded(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime, newOffWaitTime2));
                                                        out(c_int_state,
                                                            stRec(st_Off,
                                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                                  curOnTime,
                                                                  newOffWaitTime2,
                                                                  curGSC,
                                                                  curStartUp,
                                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                                    )
                                                else
                                                    (
                                                        (* OffWaitTime <= 0: turn on and set timers *)
                                                        let newOnTime3: duration = max_duration(curOnTime, onTimeField) in
                                                        let newOffWaitTime3: duration = offWaitField in
                                                        event(TimedOffTurnOn(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime,
                                                                             newOnTime3, newOffWaitTime3));
                                                        out(c_int_state,
                                                            stRec(st_On,
                                                                  val_TRUE,
                                                                  newOnTime3,
                                                                  newOffWaitTime3,
                                                                  curGSC,
                                                                  curStartUp,
                                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                                    )
                                            )
                                        else
                                            (
                                                (* OnOff == TRUE, AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0: on-side branch *)
                                                let newOnTime4: duration = max_duration(curOnTime, onTimeField) in
                                                let newOffWaitTime4: duration = offWaitField in
                                                event(OnWithTimedOffProcessed(curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime,
                                                                              val_TRUE, newOnTime4, newOffWaitTime4, curFeatureMap));
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(st_On,
                                                          val_TRUE,
                                                          newOnTime4,
                                                          newOffWaitTime4,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                    )
                            )
                        else
                            (
                            (* 7. 0.1s_timer_tick (modeled by cmd_TimerTick) *)
                            if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_TimerTick) then
                                (
                                    event(TimerTick(curState, curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime, curGSC,
                                                    curStartUp, curFeatureMap, curPrevOnOff, curOnOffCtl));
                                    (* If timers disabled (any == disabled), no decrements *)
                                    if bor_bool(eq_duration(curOnTime, dur_disabled), eq_duration(curOffWaitTime, dur_disabled)) then
                                        (
                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                stRec(curState,
                                                      curOnOff,
                                                      curOnTime,
                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                      curGSC,
                                                      curStartUp,
                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                        )
                                    else
                                        (
                                            (* Both timers finite *)
                                            if bs_is_true(curOnOff) then
                                                (
                                                    (* OnOff == TRUE *)
                                                    if gt_duration(curOnTime, dur_zero) then
                                                        (
                                                            (* OnTime > 0: decrement OnTime *)
                                                            let newOnTime5: duration = dec_duration(curOnTime) in
                                                            event(TimersDecremented(newOnTime5, curOffWaitTime));
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_On,
                                                                      curOnOff,
                                                                      newOnTime5,
                                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                                      curGSC,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                    else
                                                        (
                                                            (* OnTime == 0: turn off and clear OffWaitTime *)
                                                            event(TimersExpiredToOff(curOnTime, curOffWaitTime));
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_Off,
                                                                      val_FALSE,
                                                                      curOnTime,
                                                                      dur_zero,
                                                                      curGSC,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                )
                                            else
                                                (
                                                    (* OnOff == FALSE *)
                                                    if gt_duration(curOffWaitTime, dur_zero) then
                                                        (
                                                            (* OffWaitTime > 0: decrement OffWaitTime *)
                                                            let newOffWaitTime6: duration = dec_duration(curOffWaitTime) in
                                                            event(TimersDecremented(curOnTime, newOffWaitTime6));
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_Off,
                                                                      curOnOff,
                                                                      curOnTime,
                                                                      newOffWaitTime6,
                                                                      curGSC,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                    else
                                                        (
                                                            (* OffWaitTime == 0: no change *)
                                                            out(c_int_state,
                                                                stRec(st_Off,
                                                                      curOnOff,
                                                                      curOnTime,
                                                                      curOffWaitTime,
                                                                      curGSC,
                                                                      curStartUp,
                                                                      curFeatureMap,
                                                                      curPrevOnOff,
                                                                      curOnOffCtl))
                                                        )
                                                )
                                        )
                                )
                            else
                                (
                                (* 8. power_up_event (modeled by cmd_PowerUp) *)
                                if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_PowerUp) then
                                    (
                                        event(PowerUpEvent(curState, curOnOff, curOnTime, curOffWaitTime, curGSC,
                                                           curStartUp, curFeatureMap, curPrevOnOff, curOnOffCtl));
                                        if supports_StartUpOnOff(curFeatureMap) then
                                            (
                                                (* StartUpOnOff implemented *)
                                                if eq_startup(curStartUp, su_Off) then
                                                    (
                                                        (* Force off *)
                                                        event(StartupOutcome(curStartUp, curPrevOnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                        out(c_int_state,
                                                            stRec(st_Off,
                                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                                  curOnTime,
                                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                                  curGSC,
                                                                  curStartUp,
                                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                                    )
                                                else
                                                    (
                                                        if eq_startup(curStartUp, su_On) then
                                                            (
                                                                (* Force on *)
                                                                event(StartupOutcome(curStartUp, curPrevOnOff, val_TRUE));
                                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                                    stRec(st_On,
                                                                          val_TRUE,
                                                                          curOnTime,
                                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                                          curGSC,
                                                                          curStartUp,
                                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                                          val_TRUE,
                                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                                            )
                                                        else
                                                            (
                                                                (* Toggle relative to previous_OnOff *)
                                                                if bs_is_true(curPrevOnOff) then
                                                                    (
                                                                        (* previous_OnOff == TRUE -> now FALSE *)
                                                                        event(StartupOutcome(curStartUp, curPrevOnOff, val_FALSE));
                                                                        out(c_int_state,
                                                                            stRec(st_Off,
                                                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                                                  curOnTime,
                                                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                                                  curGSC,
                                                                                  curStartUp,
                                                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                                                  val_FALSE,
                                                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                                                    )
                                                                else
                                                                    (
                                                                        (* previous_OnOff == FALSE -> now TRUE *)
                                                                        event(StartupOutcome(curStartUp, curPrevOnOff, val_TRUE));
                                                                        out(c_int_state,
                                                                            stRec(st_On,
                                                                                  val_TRUE,
                                                                                  curOnTime,
                                                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                                                  curGSC,
                                                                                  curStartUp,
                                                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                                                  val_TRUE,
                                                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                                                    )
                                                            )
                                                    )
                                            )
                                        else
                                            (
                                                (* StartUpOnOff not supported: no change *)
                                                out(c_int_state,
                                                    stRec(curState,
                                                          curOnOff,
                                                          curOnTime,
                                                          curOffWaitTime,
                                                          curGSC,
                                                          curStartUp,
                                                          curFeatureMap,
                                                          curPrevOnOff,
                                                          curOnOffCtl))
                                            )
                                    )
                                else
                                    (
                                        (* 9. Default: unrecognized command, no change *)
                                        out(c_int_state,
                                            stRec(curState,
                                                  curOnOff,
                                                  curOnTime,
                                                  curOffWaitTime,
                                                  curGSC,
                                                  curStartUp,
                                                  curFeatureMap,
                                                  curPrevOnOff,
                                                  curOnOffCtl))
                                    )
                                )
                            )
                        )
                    )
                )
            )
        ).

(* ===================== 9. MAIN PROCESS ========================== *)

process
    (* Initialize attributes: Off state, OnOff FALSE, timers 0, GSC TRUE,
       StartUpOnOff = su_Off, FeatureMap = fm0, PreviousOnOff = val_FALSE,
       AcceptOnlyWhenOn cleared. *)
    out(c_int_state,
        stRec(st_Off,
              val_FALSE,
              dur_zero,
              dur_zero,
              val_TRUE,
              su_Off,
              fm0,
              val_FALSE,
              ctl_acceptOnlyWhenOn_clear))
    |
    (* Start replicated FSM loop *)
    !DeviceFSM()
